reason: Many y_true=1 rows are predicted 0 (frequent '1,0'); recall looks closer to ~0.70 than the claimed 0.80.
Among predicted positives there are substantial false positives ('0,1'); precision estimates near ~0.70, below the claimed 0.76.
Error magnitudes (many abs errors ~1.5-1.9) imply RMSE around ~1.25, higher than the claimed 1.04.
Residual variance vs large target variance implies R2 around ~0.96-0.97, below the claimed 0.983.
Same error distribution as the overlapping rows yields RMSE near ~1.15, consistent with the claim.
Average absolute error across the sample is roughly ~1.0-1.1, consistent with the claimed MAE of 1.0185.
